title: Request a ride from Transportation page to Contact
description: Verifies a visitor can use the Transportation page CTA to reach the Contact page to request a ride.

steps.description: Navigate to /transportation
Click the request-a-ride call to action
Verify the user lands on the Contact page

title: Navigate to About from header navigation
description: Verifies a visitor can use the header navigation to reach the About page and the About content renders.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the header navigation link for About
Verify the user lands on the About page
Verify the brand story and core values content is displayed

title: Reach Contact from Services primary CTA
description: Verifies that a visitor can use the Services page primary CTA to reach the Contact page to start an inquiry.

steps.description: Navigate to /services
Click the Speak with a Care Expert CTA
Verify the user lands on the contact page
Verify the inquiry form is displayed

title: Navigate to About from footer Quick Links
description: Verifies a visitor can reach the About page from the footer Quick Links without landing on an incorrect route.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the footer
Click the About quick link
Verify the user lands on the About page

title: Navigate to Services from header navigation
description: Verifies a visitor can use the header navigation to reach the Services listing page and service cards render.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the header navigation link for Services
Verify the user lands on the Services page
Verify the services listing cards are displayed

title: Complete contact inquiry fields without submission side effects
description: Verifies that a visitor can fill all inquiry fields and clicking Submit does not navigate away or display success/error states since the form is UI-only.

steps.description: Navigate to /contact
Fill John into the first name field
Fill Smith into the last name field
Fill 5551234567 into the phone number field
Fill john.smith@example.com into the email address field
Select a service option from the service dropdown
Fill Interested in details and next steps into the message field
Click the Submit Inquiry button
Verify the user remains on the contact page with the form still displayed
Verify no success or error confirmation state is displayed

title: Navigate to Contact from footer Quick Links
description: Verifies a visitor can reach the Contact page from the footer Quick Links.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the footer
Click the Contact quick link
Verify the user lands on the Contact page

title: Mobile hamburger menu navigation to Contact closes menu
description: Verifies a visitor on a mobile viewport can open the hamburger menu, navigate to Contact, and the menu closes after navigation.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Resize the viewport to a mobile size
Click the hamburger menu icon to open the mobile menu
Click the mobile menu navigation link for Contact
Verify the user lands on the Contact page
Verify the mobile menu is closed

title: Speak with a coordinator from About page to Contact
description: Verifies a visitor can use the About page CTA to reach the Contact page to start a conversation.

steps.description: Navigate to /about
Click the speak-with-a-coordinator call to action
Verify the user lands on the Contact page

title: Use Services page CTA to reach Contact
description: Verifies a visitor can move from the Services page to the Contact page using the primary Services CTA.

steps.description: Navigate to /services
Click the primary call-to-action to speak with a care expert
Verify the user lands on the Contact page
Verify the inquiry form is displayed

title: Navigate to Services from footer Quick Links
description: Verifies a visitor can reach the Services listing page from the footer Quick Links.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the footer
Click the Our Services quick link
Verify the user lands on the Services page

title: Navigate to Transportation from footer Quick Links
description: Verifies a visitor can reach the Transportation page from the footer Quick Links.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the footer
Click the Transportation quick link
Verify the user lands on the Transportation page

title: Browse services overview and see all service options
description: Verifies that a visitor can open the Services page and see all four service cards with their associated benefit tags displayed.

steps.description: Navigate to /services
Scroll through the services section
Verify all four service cards are displayed
Verify each service card displays benefit tags

title: Navigate to FAQ from footer Quick Links
description: Verifies a visitor can reach the FAQ page from the footer Quick Links.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the footer
Click the FAQ quick link
Verify the user lands on the FAQ page

title: Open Companion Care details from Services
description: Verifies that a visitor can open the Companion Care service details from the Services listing and the detail page renders content.

steps.description: Navigate to /services
Click the View Details action for the Companion Care service card
Verify the Companion Care service detail page content is displayed
Verify the page does not show a not-found or empty-state experience

title: Filter FAQs by Care Services category
description: Verifies that a visitor can switch to the Care Services category and the FAQ list updates to show Care Services questions.

steps.description: Navigate to /faq
Select the Care Services category
Verify the FAQ list updates to show Care Services questions
Verify the previously shown category questions are no longer displayed

title: Keep multiple FAQ answers open simultaneously
description: Verifies that a visitor can open multiple FAQ items at the same time and previously opened answers remain expanded.

steps.description: Navigate to /faq
Click the first FAQ question in the list
Click a different FAQ question in the list
Verify multiple FAQ answers are visible at the same time
Verify opening a new answer does not collapse an unrelated open answer

title: Navigate to Services from footer Core Services links
description: Verifies a visitor can use a Core Services link in the footer to reach the Services listing page.

steps.description: Navigate to /services
Scroll to the footer
Click a Core Services link in the footer
Verify the user lands on the Services page

title: View safety features content on Transportation page
description: Verifies a visitor can view the safety messaging and feature cards on the Transportation page without missing content.

steps.description: Navigate to /transportation
Scroll through the safety features section
Verify safety feature cards are displayed

title: Expand and collapse a single FAQ answer
description: Verifies that a visitor can expand an FAQ item to read the answer and then collapse it again.

steps.description: Navigate to /faq
Click the first FAQ question in the list
Click the same FAQ question again
Verify the FAQ answer is not visible after collapsing
Verify the FAQ list remains displayed and usable

title: View journey types content on Transportation page
description: Verifies a visitor can view the journey types grid and ride descriptions on the Transportation page.

steps.description: Navigate to /transportation
Scroll to the journey types section
Verify journey type descriptions are displayed

title: Use footer logo to return to homepage
description: Verifies a visitor can scroll to the footer and use the footer logo to return to the homepage successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the footer
Click the logo in the footer
Verify the user lands on the homepage

title: Navbar glass effect appears after scrolling on homepage
description: Verifies the header visually switches to the scrolled glass state after the visitor scrolls the homepage.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll down the page
Verify the navbar glass effect is visible in the scrolled state

title: View mission and story content on About page
description: Verifies a visitor can view the organization story and mission content on the About page.

steps.description: Navigate to /about
Scroll through the mission section
Verify mission and story content is displayed

title: View core values cards on About page
description: Verifies a visitor can view the core values cards on the About page.

steps.description: Navigate to /about
Scroll to the core values section
Verify core values cards are displayed

title: Open phone link from footer contact details
description: Verifies a visitor can click the phone number link in the footer and the browser attempts to open a phone-dial action.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the footer
Click the phone number link in the footer
Verify a phone-dial action is initiated
